theme_archetype.primary_archetype: Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play) mixed with Archetype 4 (Swiss/Notion structural clarity)
theme_archetype.vibe: Organized, premium, engaging, encouraging. Blending the structural minimalism of Notion with the tactile, rewarding gamification of Duolingo.
theme_archetype.reasoning: Targeting Grade 6-12 students requires a balance: it must not be too childish (hence the clean Notion structure) but needs to remain highly engaging and motivating (hence the Duolingo gamification accents). A light theme is default for clarity in reading notes and answering questions.

rules.anti_default: BANNED: Inter, Roboto, Open Sans. Do not use for headings or body.
rules.typesetting: Tight tracking for headings (tracking-tight), relaxed for body (leading-relaxed).

headings.usage: Used for all H1-H6, expressive, modern, premium tech vibe.

body.usage: Highly readable, friendly geometric sans for long-form study notes and chats.

mono.usage: For code snippets in CS doubts or math formulas.

colors.rules: NO PURPLE (#9D4CDD) AND NO TEAL (#1B93A4). Use a warm, energetic primary with high-contrast text.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 for internal card padding to prevent text collision.

grids.marketing: MODE A (Tetris Grid). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Highly asymmetrical.
grids.dashboard: MODE B (Control Room). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Dense but breathable. Widgets must stretch to h-full.

marketing_hero.overlay: bg-white/30 in light mode, bg-black/40 in dark mode to ensure text contrast.

dashboard_cards.classes: bg-white dark:bg-zinc-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-zinc-800 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

navigation_and_floating.classes: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 dark:bg-zinc-950/80 border-b border-slate-200/50 dark:border-zinc-800/50 shadow-sm

navigation.mobile: Bottom fixed navigation bar using Glassmorphism. Hide on marketing pages, show inside authenticated app.
navigation.desktop: Left sidebar (w-64) for dashboard, Top sticky nav for marketing page.
navigation.links: Must be highly visible, using primary accent color for active states.

motion_and_interactions.buttons: Active scale down (active:scale-95), hover brightness increase.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS set explicit text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900).
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none focus:ring-offset-2).

icons_and_assets.instructions: Use lucide-react with stroke-width 2.5 for a friendly, slightly bolder appearance.

hero_background.description: Abstract soothing pastel gradient background. Use for the marketing hero section behind the content.

hero_illustration.description: 3D render of a glowing lightbulb over an open book. Clean Apple-style. Use as the primary visual in the hero section.

feature_study_dashboard.description: Minimalist 3D study desk. Use for the 'Study Planner / Features' section on the landing page.

gamification_badges.description: 3D gamification badges (stars, streaks). Use in the Dashboard for the Rewards/Leaderboard sections.

testimonial_student.description: Indian student studying with tablet. Use for Testimonials, About Us, or Community sections.

component_instructions.shadcn_customization: Heavily customize Shadcn to remove the Vercel look. Increase border radius to rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl. Use generous padding.
component_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn forms. Inputs should have rounded-2xl, soft bg (bg-slate-50 dark:bg-zinc-900), and high contrast text.
component_instructions.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Avoid complex D3 for student stats. Keep data visualizations soft, rounded, and colorful.
component_instructions.gamification: Create custom visual components for streaks, XP progress bars, and badges. Use absolute positioning and z-index for overlapping avatars or layered badges.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over pastel backgrounds meets APCA standards. Use dark text (#0F172A) on primary buttons if the background is light, otherwise use white.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='start-mock-test-button').
